---
title: "Some Math"
date: 2025-06-15
description: "One sentence shown in the listing and in link previews."
categories: [math]
---

This is a placeholder post demonstrating LaTeX support, which works
out of the box in Quarto.

Inline math: $x^2 + y^2 = z^2$

Display math:

$$
\int_0^\infty e^{-x^2} \, dx = \frac{\sqrt{\pi}}{2}
$$
